priorities.title: Process drift cleanup (push state-autocommits)
priorities.check_method: git push origin master — 3 state-autocommits pushed (f46f56e..60e588a master -> master); working tree clean tracking origin. No source content in those commits — pure hook bookkeeping (tool_calls counter). PRIME-AUDIT: (1) pre-push git log showed [60e588a, 5410e4d, c672bb3] all [state-autocommit] S10; (2) push succeeded with no force, no skip-hooks, no -i flag; (3) post-push tracking origin/master clean; (4) no source/test/typecheck regression possible — git push is content-preserving.

priorities.title: Phase 2 design decision matrix (docs/phase-2-design-options.md)
priorities.check_method: PRIME-AUDIT pass (Rule 20): (1) docs/phase-2-design-options.md created, 523 lines (over 280-400 target but materially better — Council-added Risks + Playtest Readiness blocks accounted for ~175 extra lines; verdict: BETTER, not just longer). (2) 7 mechanics covered (6 from PDR + 1 surfaced by Council R1 against § VIII.3: Sever-as-disruption); all 7 have all template fields (ASCII sketch + fires-when + spec authority + cost + pros + cons + risks + playtest readiness + verdict + flag-for-veto). (3) All spec citations resolve to real Blueprint sections: § II (48), § III.4 (98), § III.7, § V (184), § VI.3 (256), § VI.4 (269), § VI.5 (279), § VII.1 (298), § VII.2 (315), § VIII.3 (345), § VIII.4 (357), § VIII.6 (373), § X.2 (436), § X.4 (460), § XI.8 (532), § XIII (733), § XIV (799), § XV (825). LOCKED_DECISIONS § 2.4-7, § 3.10-11, § 10.2, § 10.3 cited. (4) Mermaid prereq DAG: B→{C,D,E}, E→F, A dotted→{C,D,E}, G standalone. No cycles. Validates B→C→D→E disruption-suite semantics per § VIII.3. (5) Cost anchors INITIALLY stale (handoff said world.ts 370, actual 481; effectsRenderer 470, actual 569 post-S10 cinematics) — DETECTED via wc -l, corrected in table + flagged as carry-forward: effectsRenderer.ts 569 LOC > 500 charter, refactor target for S12 if Phase 2 adds more effect kinds. (6) Open Questions (7) each have 2+ defensible answers (validated against PRIME-AUDIT Q1 MP-mode/Q3 Spiral-propagation/Q4 steal-combo/Q5 decay/Q6 Sever-omit/Q7 F-depth). (7) Council Battle Ledger appended to PDR file (.claude/plans/2026-05-11_PDR_Session_11.md). Quality scorecard pre-revision 3/5 across (Quality/Tool-Util/Completeness, Efficiency 4/5) — post-revisions all expected to land at 4/5 per Gemini adoption. Council verdict: SHIP.
